questions.model_answer:
Core principles for Kitchen Management as a Head Chef:

1. Service recovery quality predicts repeat business better than perfect service rates.
2. Allergen communication failures are high-severity operational risks.
3. Prep discipline is the strongest predictor of peak-hour consistency.

Standard workflow:
1. Set up station readiness, prep levels, and hygiene controls pre-service.
2. Execute service SOP with quality checks at pass/dispatch.
3. Manage guest communication and recovery when delays occur.
4. Track waste, yield, and peak-period throughput.
5. Close with sanitation, stock reconciliation, and handover notes.
